title: stelis sotoana
intro: Stelis sotoana, also known as the "Misty Orchid", is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis sotoana are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote tissue repair. Herbal preparations of Stelis sotoana typically involve drying and grinding the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications.
